SEARCH
Package com.bencodez.simpleapi.valuerequest

Class ValueRequest

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.simpleapi.valuerequest.ValueRequest
public class ValueRequest extends Object
Utility class for requesting values from players. Supports both modern graphical dialogs via UniDialog as well as a chat based fallback for older versions or servers without dialog support. This class is inspired by the ValueRequest system from AdvancedCore but is designed to be simpler and more self contained.

  • Constructor Details

    • ValueRequest

      public ValueRequest(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin, UniDialogService dialogService, InputMethod method)
      Create a new value requester using the provided plugin and dialog service. The method parameter can be used to override the player's preferred method; if null then InputMethod.DIALOG will be used by default when available.
      Parameters:
      plugin - the plugin used to construct conversations
      dialogService - the dialog service used for GUI dialogs (may be null)
      method - the preferred input method for this request or null

    • ValueRequest

      public ValueRequest(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin, UniDialogService dialogService)
      Create a new value requester using the provided plugin and dialog service. This constructor defaults to using InputMethod.DIALOG when available.
      Parameters:
      plugin - the plugin used to construct conversations
      dialogService - the dialog service used for GUI dialogs (may be null)

  • Method Details

    • requestString

      public void requestString(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, StringListener listener)
      Request a string value from a player. If no method is provided the default method for this requester will be used. This method has no options and allows custom input.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to prompt
      listener - the callback to invoke with the provided value

    • requestString

      public void requestString(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, String currentValue, List<String> options, boolean allowCustom, String promptText, StringListener listener)
      Request a string value with a list of selectable options. If allowCustom is true the player may provide their own value in addition to selecting from the provided options. When no options are provided and custom input is not allowed the method falls back to chat regardless of the selected input method.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to prompt
      currentValue - the currently set value (may be null)
      options - a list of valid options (may be null or empty)
      allowCustom - whether players may enter their own value
      promptText - an optional prompt to display above the dialog; if null a default will be used
      listener - the callback to invoke with the provided value

    • requestNumber

      public void requestNumber(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, Number currentValue, List<? extends Number> options, boolean allowCustom, String promptText, NumberListener listener)
      Request a numeric value from a player. If no options are provided the player may supply any number. When options are provided and allowCustom is false the player must choose one of the provided options.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to prompt
      currentValue - the currently set value (may be null)
      options - a list of allowed numeric options (may be null or empty)
      allowCustom - whether players may enter their own number
      promptText - an optional prompt to display above the dialog; if null a default will be used
      listener - the callback to invoke with the provided numeric value

    • requestBoolean

      public void requestBoolean(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, Boolean currentValue, String promptText, BooleanListener listener)
      Request a boolean value from a player. This shows a dialog with true/false buttons when possible or falls back to chat input using "true" or "false".
      Parameters:
      player - the player to prompt
      currentValue - the currently set value (may be null)
      promptText - an optional prompt to display above the dialog; if null a default will be used
      listener - the callback to invoke with the provided boolean value

    • requestNumber

      public void requestNumber(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, NumberListener listener)
      Request a number with no predefined options. Players may provide any numeric value.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to prompt
      listener - the callback to invoke with the provided number

    • requestBoolean

      public void requestBoolean(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, BooleanListener listener)
      Request a boolean with no predefined current value.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to prompt
      listener - the callback to invoke with the provided boolean

    • requestMultipleValues

      public void requestMultipleValues(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, List<MultiValueField> fields, MultiValueListener listener)

    • requestMultipleStrings

      public void requestMultipleStrings(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, List<String> prompts, List<String> currentValues, MultiStringListener listener)
      Request multiple string values from a player using the modern multi-value request system. This method internally converts prompts into MultiValueField objects and delegates to requestMultipleValues(Player, List, MultiValueListener).
      Parameters:
      player - the player to prompt
      prompts - list of prompt labels
      currentValues - optional default values
      listener - callback containing ordered string results
